title: poa laxa subsp. minor
intro: Poa laxa subsp. minor, also known as the lesser meadow-grass, is a subspecies of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa laxa subsp. minor include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as an infusion or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
